name: policy_exists_rls_disabled
title: Policy Exists RLS Disabled
description: Detects cases where row level security (RLS) policies have been created, but RLS has not been enabled for the underlying table.
detail: Table \`public.prompts\` has RLS policies but RLS is not enabled on the table. Policies include {"Allow anonymous select on prompts","Allow anonymous update on prompts","Anyone can create prompts","Anyone can view prompts","Users can delete own prompts","Users can update own prompts"}.

name: policy_exists_rls_disabled
title: Policy Exists RLS Disabled
description: Detects cases where row level security (RLS) policies have been created, but RLS has not been enabled for the underlying table.
detail: Table \`public.subscribers\` has RLS policies but RLS is not enabled on the table. Policies include {"Allow anonymous insert on subscribers","Anyone can subscribe","Anyone can view subscribers","Authenticated users can view subscribers"}.

name: policy_exists_rls_disabled
title: Policy Exists RLS Disabled
description: Detects cases where row level security (RLS) policies have been created, but RLS has not been enabled for the underlying table.
detail: Table \`public.user_likes\` has RLS policies but RLS is not enabled on the table. Policies include {"Allow all operations on user_likes","Allow anonymous delete on user_likes","Allow anonymous insert on user_likes","Allow anonymous select on user_likes"}.

name: rls_disabled_in_public
title: RLS Disabled in Public
description: Detects cases where row level security (RLS) has not been enabled on tables in schemas exposed to PostgREST
detail: Table \`public.subscribers\` is public, but RLS has not been enabled.

name: rls_disabled_in_public
title: RLS Disabled in Public
description: Detects cases where row level security (RLS) has not been enabled on tables in schemas exposed to PostgREST
detail: Table \`public.user_likes\` is public, but RLS has not been enabled.

name: rls_disabled_in_public
title: RLS Disabled in Public
description: Detects cases where row level security (RLS) has not been enabled on tables in schemas exposed to PostgREST
detail: Table \`public.prompts\` is public, but RLS has not been enabled.
